calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Paul Singer, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff John Stewart Company, represented by agent Georgette Brown.
Steven Miyake, Esq., for and with the Defendant: Ronnette Reed. (Mr. Miyaki will filed the substitution of attorney by 03-05-10)
The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304-B for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed settlement agreement
"Stipulation for Possesseion of Premises" which was filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
Trial Date vacated.
